summary: Tested enhanced navigation for Blendlink.net with Facebook Group integration. All features working correctly: 5 main nav items + More menu, Facebook Share Overlay, contextual Back to Group FAB, and semi-transparent floating bottom nav.
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
SessionStorage used correctly for contextual FAB visibility
Bottom nav styling correctly implements semi-transparent glass effect with backdrop-blur-xl
context_for_next_testing_agent: Navigation system fully tested. All features working: More menu with Minted Photos and Community Group options, Facebook Share Overlay with photo thumbnails, Back to Group FAB appears contextually after visiting FB group.

mobile_bottom_nav.5_main_items: PASS - Home, Marketplace, Notifications, Wallet, Profile visible
mobile_bottom_nav.more_menu_button: PASS - Ellipsis icon visible with data-testid='nav-more'
mobile_bottom_nav.more_menu_popup: PASS - Opens with Minted Photos and Community Group options

facebook_share_overlay.header: PASS - Shows 'Blendlink Community' with Facebook icon
facebook_share_overlay.no_photos_message: PASS - Shows 'No minted photos yet' when user has no photos
facebook_share_overlay.opens_facebook: PASS - window.open() called with Facebook Group URL

back_to_group_fab.contextual_visibility: PASS - Hidden before visiting group, visible after
back_to_group_fab.position: PASS - Fixed bottom-right on mobile (bottom-24 right-4)

desktop_sidebar.main_nav_items: PASS - Home, Marketplace, Notifications, Wallet, Profile
